metadata.title: Letter to Mr. Murray Sheehan, 8 September 1941
metadata.creator: President
metadata.description: A letter from the President to Mr. Murray Sheehan regarding the admission of Karoon Gengradomying to Miami University as a freshman.
metadata.transcript:
September 8, 1941

Mr. Murray Sheehan  
Monsonhurst 59  
Glouchester, Massachusetts  

Dear Murray:  

Replying to your letter of September 6, I can  
assure you that we shall be pleased to admit Karoon  
Gengradomying to Miami University as a freshman.  

While of course we know nothing of the University  
you mention in Bangkok or of its entrance examinations,  
the other boys from Thailand have made such a good  
record here that we do not hesitate.  

Freshman Week begins with a convocation next  
Sunday evening, September 14, but we can hold a room  
for him a little longer if necessary. We are trying  
to squeeze him into one of the freshman dormitories.  

Cordially yours,  

President
